_notes.purpose: The byte-equality anchor for V2. dispatch=draps_v1 routes the knot through the V1 DRAPS path (which executes the inline Postman JS in DATA/SWAPS-1LOAN-WHAT-IF-DEMO.json). Component inputs below are advisory in this iteration; they become executed when a future profile sets dispatch=v2_direct.
_notes.v1_runtime_discrepancy_tariff: The current V1 Python client (backend/draps_client.py:_build_config_data) sends tariff_current=tariff_peak (flat). The escalation values 0.50 -> 0.60 below match the design intent recorded in design-v1-config-architecture.md §3.1 and reflect V1's underlying Postman JS calibration, not the Python wrapper. Reconcile in Iteration 4+ when dispatch=v2_direct activates.
_notes.source_of_truth_for_v1_constants: design-v1-config-architecture.md §3.1 (marked VERIFIED against SWAPS-1LOAN-WHAT-IF-3-INP-FINAL.json at design time).
